ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecular_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular function */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* Gene Ontology term associated with the function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the molecular function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the function and its activity */,
  "mechanism_of_action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mechanism by which the molecular function operates */,
  "biological_significance" TEXT /* Explanation of the biological significance of the molecular function */,
  "references" TEXT /* A list of scientific references or publications that support the function's description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_functions" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the molecular function associated with the protein */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Code indicating the type of evidence supporting the association */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id", "function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the protein is derived */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from UniProt for the protein */,
  "isoform" TEXT /* Information about different isoforms of the protein */,
  "mutation_data" TEXT /* Information about known mutations and their effects */,
  "structure_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the 3D structure of the protein (e.g., PDB ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_ontology" (
  "go_term" TEXT /* Gene Ontology term */,
  "go_name" TEXT /* Name of the Gene Ontology term */,
  "go_description" TEXT /* Description of the Gene Ontology term */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the GO term (e.g., Biological Process, Molecular Function, Cellular Component) */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the GO term is obsolete */,
  "replacement_go_term" TEXT /* If the GO term is obsolete, the new GO term to use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_term")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular function being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the molecular function */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the molecular function data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the access (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES molecular_functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_category_relationships" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular function */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the function */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the research project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_pi_id FOREIGN KEY ("pi_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_functions" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecular function associated with the project */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the project's contribution to the understanding of the molecular function */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the function within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "function_id")
)
